languages.text: "С твоим глазом все в порядке. Просто прекрати лезть в него пальцами".

traits.locale_text: "С твоим глазом всё в порядке. Просто прекрати лезть в него пальцами".

languages.text: "There's nothing wrong with your eye. Just stop sticking your fingers in it."
languages.original_text: "С твоим глазом все в порядке. Просто прекрати лезть в него пальцами".

traits.locale_text: "There's nothing wrong with your eye. Just stop sticking your fingers in it."
"There's nothing wrong with your eye. Just stop sticking your fingers in it."
"There's nothing wrong with your eye. Just stop sticking your fingers in it."

languages.text: 「あなたの目は何も問題ない。ただ、指を突っ込まないようにするだけ」
languages.original_text: "There's nothing wrong with your eye. Just stop sticking your fingers in it."

languages.text: "Gözünde bir şey yok. Parmağını sokup durmayı kes yeter."
languages.original_text: "There's nothing wrong with your eye. Just stop sticking your fingers in it."

traits.locale_text: "Gözünde bir şey yok. Parmağını sokup durmayı kes yeter."

languages.text: “您的眼睛没问题，别再用手去戳了。”
languages.original_text: "There's nothing wrong with your eye. Just stop sticking your fingers in it."

traits.locale_text: “您的眼睛没问题，别再用手去戳了。”

languages.text: "Eurem Auge fehlt nichts. Hört einfach auf, mit Eurem Fingern darin herumzubohren."
languages.original_text: "There's nothing wrong with your eye. Just stop sticking your fingers in it."

traits.locale_text: "Eurem Auge fehlt nichts. Hört einfach auf, mit Eurem Fingern darin herumzubohren."

languages.text: « Votre œil est en parfait état. Si déjà vous arrêtiez de mettre vos doigts dedans… »
languages.original_text: "There's nothing wrong with your eye. Just stop sticking your fingers in it."

traits.locale_text: « Votre œil est en parfait état. Si déjà vous arrêtiez de mettre vos doigts dedans… »

languages.text: «A su ojo no le pasa nada, solo tiene que dejar de meterse el dedo».
languages.original_text: "There's nothing wrong with your eye. Just stop sticking your fingers in it."

traits.locale_text: «A su ojo no le pasa nada, solo tiene que dejar de meterse el dedo».
